commands: rm -rf $VP_HOME/js_runtime/node/22.11.0 # Ensure pinned Node.js is not cached
rm -rf $VP_HOME/package_manager/npm/10.5.0 $VP_HOME/package_manager/npm/10.5.0.lock # Ensure pinned npm is not cached
test "$(npm --version)" = "10.5.0" && echo 'npm shim auto-downloaded Node.js and packageManager on first invocation'
test -x $VP_HOME/js_runtime/node/22.11.0/bin/node && echo 'pinned Node.js@22.11.0 is now cached'
test -x $VP_HOME/package_manager/npm/10.5.0/npm/bin/npm && echo 'pinned npm@10.5.0 is now cached'
test "$(npm --version)" = "10.5.0" && echo 'subsequent invocations reuse the cached version'
